chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 8262 of 2018 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 12-05-2025 None present for the petitioner Ms. Nazia Siddiqui, advocate for respondents Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General This petition is pending since 2018 without any progress. Petitioner remains unrepresented without any intimation or justification. Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
